# Security Policy

## Supported Reporting

For security-sensitive issues in ZeaZ Omega Chat, do not open a public issue with exploit details or secrets.

## What to Include

- A short summary of the issue
- Affected file or endpoint
- Reproduction steps
- Relevant logs with secrets removed

## What to Avoid

- Raw tokens
- Passwords
- Private keys
- Personal data

## Local Scope

This project is maintained inside the `apps/zchat` directory. Keep reports scoped to this app unless the issue clearly affects the wider repository.
